Dockit [net10.0] [0.5.0-eec7318b6a5339cd2264acaaa91e3d440b6237dd]
Generate Markdown documentation from a .NET assembly and its XML documentation file.
Copyright (c) Kouji Matsui (@kekyo@mi.kekyo.net)
https://github.com/kekyo/Dockit
License: Under MIT.

Usage: dockit-dotnet [options] <assembly-path> <output-directory>
Options:
  -h, --help                 Show this message and exit.
  -l, --initial-level=VALUE  Set the base heading level of the generated
                               Markdown. The default is 1.
